====Pokémon====
This is a listing of Sabrina's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|pkmn=Drowzee
|type1=Psychic
|img=Sabrina Drowzee Adventures.png
|epnum=PS019
|epname=Blame It on Eevee
|desc={{p|Drowzee}} was used to sneak up on [[Erika]] prior to the showdown in [[Saffron City]]. However, it was noticed by the {{type|Grass}} Gym Leader and was easily defeated by Erika's {{p|Vileplume}}'s {{m|Petal Dance}}.

None of Drowzee's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|gender=male
|pkmn=Kadabra
|main=yes
|type1=Psychic
|img=Sabrina Kadabra Adventures.png
|epnum=PS020
|epname=Meanvile...Vileplume!
|desc={{p|Kadabra}} is Sabrina's mode of transportation and often carries her on his back. He was able to disguise himself as {{adv|Professor Oak}} and presumably other people as well. During Sabrina's battle with {{adv|Green}}, he is shown to be one of Sabrina's most powerful Pokémon with very strong moves.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|gender=female
|pkmn=Mr. Mime
|type1=Psychic
|img=Sabrina Mr Mime Adventures.png
|epnum=PS028
|epname=Peace of Mime
|desc={{p|Mr. Mime}} was used by Sabrina to keep a massive {{m|Light Screen}} around [[Saffron City]] in order to keep intruders out. She fell to {{adv|Red}} and {{adv|Blue}}'s teamwork in using [[Blue's Golduck]] to find her and Red's [[Pika]] to attack her. She was later used during the Gym Leader tournament, where she battled [[Bugsy's Scyther]] and defeated his {{p|Heracross}}.

Mr. Mime's known moves are {{m|Light Screen}}, {{m|Barrier}}, {{m|Confusion}}, {{m|Encore}}, and {{m|Psybeam}}, and her Ability is {{a|Filter}}.}}

{{anchor|Alakazam 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|gender=female
|pkmn=Alakazam
|type1=Psychic
|img=Sabrina Alakazam Adventures.png
|epnum=PS065
|epname=Karate Machop!
|desc={{p|Alakazam}} first appeared on [[Cerise Island]], where she was used to hand out the [[Spoons of Destiny]]. Later, she helped battle against Lorelei's {{type|Ice}} Pokémon. She also made an appearance in the {{MangaArc|Black 2 & White 2}}, where she helped choose a movie for {{adv|Whitley}}.

Alakazam's known moves are {{m|Kinesis}} and {{m|Psychic}}, and her Ability is {{a|Synchronize}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|gender=female
|pkmn=Venomoth
|type1=Bug
|type2=Poison
|img=Sabrina Venomoth Adventures.png
|epnum=PS073
|epname=Valiant Venomoth!
|desc={{p|Venomoth}} was first used to battle [[Lorelei]] on Cerise Island. Due to Sabrina and Green's inability to work together, her moves were quickly blown away. Once Green was knocked unconscious, Sabrina was effectively able to knock out [[Lorelei's Cloyster]] with a repeated usage of Mega Drain. In the {{MangaArc|Gold, Silver & Crystal}}, Venomoth was seen at the Mt. Silver hot springs and later appeared with Sabrina at the Pokémon League.

Venomoth's known moves are {{m|Sleep Powder}} and {{m|Mega Drain}}.}}

=====Released=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|pkmn=Moltres
|type1=Fire
|type2=Flying
|img=Sabrina Moltres Adventures.png
|epnum=PS026
|epname=Holy Moltres
|main=Legendary birds (Adventures)
|main_section=Moltres
|desc={{p|Moltres}}, having been captured near the [[Indigo Plateau]], first appeared on [[Cinnabar Island]], where it fought against {{adv|Blaine}} and Red before being sent to Sabrina. During the battle between Red, Blue and Green and the Rocket Triad members [[Lt. Surge]], [[Koga]], and Sabrina, it was merged with {{p|Articuno}} and {{p|Zapdos}} to create Thu-Fi-Zer. Once it was beaten, the three birds separated and returned to the wild.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|pkmn=Thu-Fi-Zer
|nick=Thu-Fi-Zer
|type1=???
|type2=Flying
|img=Thu-Fi-Zer.png
|epnum=PS033
|epname=The Winged Legends
|main=Legendary birds (Adventures)
|main_section=Thu-Fi-Zer
|desc=Thu-Fi-Zer is the combined form of the three [[legendary birds]] that came into being with the power of Red's Gym Badges. It fought against the three Pokédex holders of [[Kanto]] in the [[Silph Co.]] building before it was separated by [[Saur]]'s {{m|SolarBeam}}, [[Blasty]]'s {{m|Hydro Pump}} and [[Blue's Charizard]]'s {{m|Flamethrower}}.}}
